title: DOBWGXZ Ultrasonic Pest Repeller, Mouse Repellent, 4 Pack Insect Repellent Plug In, Pest Control for Mice, Rat, Mosquito, Spider, Cockroach, Ant, Fly Etc, Safe for Pets and Humans
features: 【Comprehensive Pest Control】This set of four pest repellers uses advanced frequency conversion, bionic sonic, and a wide frequency range to disrupt pests' nervous systems, making them uncomfortable and driving them away. It effectively targets mice, rats, mosquitoes, flies, beetles, cockroaches, moths, ants, bedbugs, and more.

【Safe and Family-Friendly】Designed to be safe for humans and pets, this insect repellent offers a chemical-free solution to pest control, eliminating the need for harmful poisons or traps. The non-toxic, odorless technology keeps your home free from pests without compromising safety. Ideal for use around children, pets, and sensitive areas like kitchens and nurseries.

【Effortless Operation & Maintenance-Free】Simply plug the repellers into any standard wall outlet to start repelling pests immediately. This hassle-free setup requires no maintenance, providing a silent and effective solution for any room, including bedrooms, offices, and living areas. Enjoy a pest-free environment without constant monitoring or manual intervention.

【Enhanced Coverage & 360° Protection】Each unit repellent covers up to 1600 square feet, offering 360° protection with 3D surround dual speakers and expanded sound channels. This ensures pests are driven away from every corner of the room, leaving no place to hide. For best results, use one unit per room, especially in larger spaces like basements, garages, and warehouses.

【Long-Term Effectiveness & Energy Efficient】Designed for continuous use, this mice repellent typically shows results in 1-2 weeks, with full effectiveness in 3-4 weeks. Keep the devices plugged in for ongoing protection. With only 3W power consumption, they provide an energy-efficient, cost-effective solution for long-term pest management.
